overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a wizard character exploring a Gothic stone common room with vaulted ceilings and arched windows. The character walks through the cluttered interior, passes an elderly NPC, and exits through a wooden door into a larger classroom hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic common room with central fireplace and reading areas

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room toward the large stone fireplace, observing the scattered books and furniture

entered.detail: ornate stone fireplace with carved mantelpiece and decorative crest above
tall lancet windows with diamond-patterned leaded glass
tall lancet windows with diamond-patterned leaded glass
upholstered armchair surrounded by stacks of books and papers
tall unstable stacks of books and scrolls on the floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a spacious Gothic common room with high vaulted ceilings. A large stone fireplace dominates the far wall between two tall arched windows, while comfortable furniture and scattered books create a lived-in atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: Common room reading nook with bookshelves and tapestries

agents.ego_description: walking along the left side of the room toward a corridor entrance, passing an elderly figure examining the shelves

notable_agents.action: elderly figure in dark robes standing near a bookshelf, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: tall dark oak bookshelf filled with leather-bound volumes
large framed tapestry hanging on the stone wall
pointed stone archway leading to a darker corridor

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking past a wooden bookshelf where an elderly NPC stands examining the volumes. The camera turns left, revealing a decorative tapestry on the wall and an arched corridor entrance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: Narrow corridor with coat rack leading to wooden exit door

events.description: character opens the heavy wooden door and steps through onto a stone balcony overlooking a large classroom hall

agents.ego_description: approaching the wooden door at the end of the corridor and opening it to exit the common room

entered.detail: ornate wooden stand holding wizard hats and cloaks
portrait paintings in gold oval frames on the stone walls
heavy dark wood door with iron handle and hinges
ornate Gothic stone balustrade overlooking the hall below

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow corridor lined with framed portraits and a coat rack. At the end, they open a heavy wooden door and step out onto a stone balcony that overlooks a large classroom hall below.

scene_state.functional_zone: Large classroom or great hall with long dining tables

events.description: character walks down the stairs from the balcony into the main classroom area

agents.ego_description: walking down the stone stairs from the balcony into the large classroom hall with long tables

entered.detail: long wooden dining tables with attached benches arranged in rows
tall arched windows at the far end of the hall letting in bright light
dark wood storage cabinets with glass doors against the left wall
large Gothic archway at the far end of the classroom

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the balcony into a spacious classroom or great hall with long wooden tables and benches. Large arched windows at the far end illuminate the room, while wooden cabinets line the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, cluttered atmosphere of a Gothic common room into the expansive scale of a grand classroom hall. It begins by gliding through a spacious room with high vaulted ceilings and a large stone fireplace, moving past comfortable furniture and scattered books. As the character advances, the camera passes an elderly NPC by a wooden bookshelf before turning left toward a decorative tapestry and an arched corridor. The scene then shifts into a narrow hallway lined with framed portraits, leading directly to a heavy wooden door that opens onto a stone balcony. Finally, the camera descends from the overlook into a vast hall filled with long wooden tables and benches, illuminated by large arched windows at the far end.
